title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!
